description: Style Notekama sutra deodorant for women is a versatile fragrance that goes for any occasion. Spray some on when you're hitting the gym or crashing at a friend's place. It will not overpower that expensive perfume you're dabbing on so you can use this purely to stay BO-free even on date nights or a corporate meeting.Product DetailsKama Sutra A.Maya is a deodorant for women that comes in an aerosol spray canisterCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 125 ml
